immediate_actions.step: Note the start time of the seizure
Clear area of hazards and cushion head
immediate_actions.note: Remove sharp or hard objects nearby

immediate_actions.step: Do NOT restrain movements or put anything in the mouth
immediate_actions.note: Restraining causes fractures; tongue-swallowing is a myth

immediate_actions.step: Call 911 if: first seizure, >5 min, injury occurred, no regained consciousness

next_steps.step: Roll to recovery position (on side) once convulsions stop
Begin CPR if not breathing after convulsions stop
Stay through postictal confusion — up to 30 minutes is normal
